title: Install a Replacement Pneumatic Cylinder
summary: Install a new pneumatic cylinder by transferring the required fittings and spherical rod end from the old cylinder, mounting the new cylinder in the bracket, reconnecting the rod end and air lines, restoring the cover plate and side panels as needed, and restarting the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when replacing a pneumatic cylinder and the installation portion of the replacement task is required after removal of the old cylinder.
not_for: Do not use for pneumatic cylinder removal.
Do not use as a standalone operator station startup procedure; this runbook only references the startup procedure on page 66.
Do not use when required installation details or referenced restart instructions are unavailable.

responsibilities: Transfer fittings and the spherical rod end from the old cylinder to the replacement cylinder.
Restart the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.

safety_notes: This procedure is not marked support-safe in the candidate.
The source packet for this installation excerpt does not provide additional installation-specific safety controls, so no further controls are asserted here.
Use the referenced startup procedure on page 66 rather than inventing restart actions.
access_or_tools_needed: Old cylinder for transfer of air fittings and spherical rod end
Access to top and/or bottom side panels
Access to the referenced operator station startup procedure on page 66

access_required: Physical access to the pneumatic cylinder mounting location
Access to the cover plate and top and/or bottom side panels if installed
Access to the operator station startup procedure on page 66
system_preconditions: Old pneumatic cylinder has been removed and is available for transfer of fittings and spherical rod end
Replacement pneumatic cylinder is available for installation

visual_references.description: Maintenance figure identifying the pneumatic cylinder and related service location.

steps.title: Transfer fittings and spherical rod end
steps.purpose: Prepare the replacement cylinder with the same connection hardware and rod-end component needed for installation.
steps.instruction: Transfer the air fittings and spherical rod end from the old cylinder to the new cylinder.
steps.expected_result: The replacement cylinder has the required air fittings and spherical rod end installed.
steps.healthy_condition: Air fittings and spherical rod end are present on the new cylinder as required for installation.
steps.failure_condition: Required fittings or the spherical rod end cannot be transferred or installed on the new cylinder.

actions.label: Transfer fittings
actions.exact_action: Transfer the air fittings from the old cylinder to the new cylinder.

actions.label: Transfer rod end
actions.exact_action: Transfer the spherical rod end from the old cylinder to the new cylinder.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Pneumatic cylinder identification and the general cylinder assembly referenced by the replacement procedure.

stop_or_escalate_if: The air fittings cannot be transferred or installed as shown in the source.
The spherical rod end cannot be transferred or installed as shown in the source.

source_evidence.text: Transfer the air fittings and spherical rod end from the old cylinder to the new cylinder.

steps.title: Mount cylinder in bracket
steps.purpose: Secure the replacement cylinder into its mounting bracket.
steps.instruction: Place the bottom of the cylinder in the bracket and install the other half of the bracket with the two (2) M6 socket head screws.
steps.expected_result: The cylinder is seated in the bracket and secured with the bracket half and two M6 socket head screws.
steps.healthy_condition: The cylinder is positioned in the bracket and the bracket assembly is installed.
steps.failure_condition: The cylinder cannot be seated in the bracket or the bracket half and screws cannot be installed.

actions.label: Place cylinder
actions.exact_action: Place the bottom of the cylinder in the bracket.

actions.label: Install bracket half
actions.exact_action: Install the other half of the bracket with the two (2) M6 socket head screws.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Pneumatic cylinder location and general mounting context for bracket installation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The cylinder cannot be placed in the bracket as shown in the source.
The bracket half or the two (2) M6 socket head screws cannot be installed as shown in the source.

source_evidence.text: Place the bottom of the cylinder in the bracket and install the other half of the bracket with the two (2) M6 socket head screws.

steps.title: Connect rod end to lift plate
steps.purpose: Reconnect the cylinder rod end to the lift plate linkage.
steps.instruction: Slip the rod end between the brackets on the lift plate and insert the pin and retaining ring.
steps.expected_result: The rod end is positioned between the lift plate brackets and retained with the pin and retaining ring.
steps.healthy_condition: The rod end is connected to the lift plate and retained by the pin and retaining ring.
steps.failure_condition: The rod end cannot be positioned between the brackets or the pin and retaining ring cannot be installed.

actions.label: Position rod end
actions.exact_action: Slip the rod end between the brackets on the lift plate.

actions.label: Install pin and retaining ring
actions.exact_action: Insert the pin and retaining ring.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: General pneumatic cylinder assembly context related to rod-end connection.

stop_or_escalate_if: The rod end cannot be installed between the lift plate brackets as shown in the source.
The pin or retaining ring cannot be installed as shown in the source.

source_evidence.text: Slip the rod end between the brackets on the lift plate and insert the pin and retaining ring.

steps.title: Reconnect air lines
steps.purpose: Restore pneumatic connections to the replacement cylinder.
steps.expected_result: The air lines are reconnected to the replacement cylinder.
steps.healthy_condition: Air lines are connected at the cylinder connection points.
steps.failure_condition: Air lines cannot be reconnected as shown in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: General pneumatic cylinder identification and air-line connection context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The air lines cannot be reconnected as shown in the source.

steps.title: Replace cover plate
steps.purpose: Restore the cover plate removed for access during cylinder replacement.
steps.instruction: Replace the cover plate using the eight (8) M8 button-head screws.
steps.expected_result: The cover plate is reinstalled with eight M8 button-head screws.
steps.healthy_condition: The cover plate is in place and secured with the specified screws.
steps.failure_condition: The cover plate cannot be installed or the eight M8 button-head screws cannot be installed.

actions.label: Install cover plate
actions.exact_action: Replace the cover plate using the eight (8) M8 button-head screws.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: General pneumatic cylinder service area associated with cover plate reassembly.

stop_or_escalate_if: The cover plate cannot be replaced as shown in the source.
The eight (8) M8 button-head screws cannot be installed as shown in the source.

source_evidence.text: Replace the cover plate using the eight (8) M8 button-head screws.

steps.title: Reinstall side panels if necessary
steps.purpose: Restore any top and/or bottom side panels removed for access.
steps.instruction: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.
steps.expected_result: Any removed top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled.
steps.healthy_condition: Required side panels are back in place.
steps.failure_condition: A required top or bottom side panel cannot be reinstalled.

actions.label: Reinstall side panels
actions.exact_action: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

stop_or_escalate_if: A required top and/or bottom side panel cannot be reinstalled.

source_evidence.text: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

steps.title: Restart operator station
steps.purpose: Return the operator station to service using the referenced startup procedure.
steps.instruction: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.
steps.expected_result: The operator station is restarted using the referenced startup procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station restart procedure is available and can be followed.
steps.failure_condition: The referenced startup procedure is not available to the user.

actions.label: Use referenced startup procedure
actions.exact_action: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.

stop_or_escalate_if: The referenced operator station restart procedure is not available to the user.

source_evidence.text: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.

success_criteria: The replacement pneumatic cylinder is installed.
Required fittings and the spherical rod end have been transferred to the new cylinder.
The cylinder is mounted in the bracket and connected to the lift plate.
The cover plate and any necessary side panels are reinstalled.
The operator station is restarted using the referenced startup procedure.
healthy_conditions: Replacement cylinder has transferred fittings and spherical rod end installed.
Cylinder is secured in the bracket with the specified hardware.
Rod end is connected with the pin and retaining ring.
Cover plate and any necessary side panels are restored.
Referenced startup procedure is available for restart.
failure_conditions: Cylinder, bracket, rod end, pin, retaining ring, fittings, or air lines cannot be installed as shown in the source.
Cover plate or side panels cannot be reinstalled.
Referenced operator station startup procedure is not available.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the cylinder, bracket, rod end, pin, retaining ring, fittings, or air lines cannot be installed as shown in the source.
Escalate if the referenced operator station restart procedure is not available to the user.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Pneumatic cylinder identification and general service context for the replacement installation procedure.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide the installation section text content, only the candidate-derived steps and source reference.
No torque values are provided for the M6 socket head screws or M8 button-head screws.
No explicit verification checks, leak checks, or post-install functional checks are provided in the source packet.
No estimated completion time is provided for this installation excerpt.
No installation-specific safety controls, production-stop requirement, or LOTO requirement are stated in the supplied installation excerpt.
No dedicated installation figure for each step is supplied in the packet; only the general pneumatic cylinder figure is available.
